'''Golov Nakhym''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]] who was the leader of the notorious [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]] group, the [[Hurrim]], during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

==Biography==
In [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]], he gave the order to open fire on civilian [[Transport/Legends|transports]] in the [[Nezni system/Legends|Nezni system]] in a raid that was unintentionally aided by the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]].

Nakhym was on the [[Hurrim Base]] during a [[Battle of Hurrim Base|revenge strike]] by the Alliance and [[Dunari]]. He attempted to escape the platform's destruction on the [[Lambda-class T-4a shuttle/Legends|''Lambda''-class T-4a shuttle]], ''[[Lendros]]'', only to be disabled. He was captured by a [[Storm Unit (team)|Storm Unit]] and taken aboard the [[MC80 Star Cruiser/Legends|MC80 Star Cruiser]], [[Liberty/Legends|''Liberty'']].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance]]'' {{1stm}}
